pr.title: Non-record: Aweb Ultimate — 1.1190 BPB (10min 8×H100, independent PR #549 reproduction)

output.summary: Recreates SOTA stack: 11L 512d LeakyReLU² net with late XSA, partial RoPE, LN scale, EMA+SWA, Parallel Muon, GPTQ-lite quant, and Legal Score-First TTT.
techniques: - 11L 512d LeakyReLU² transformer with late-layer XSA, partial RoPE, and LN scaling
- Parallel Muon optimizer with EMA/SWA and Legal Score-First TTT training
- GPTQ-lite int6/int8 quantization plus compression for compact artifact
